mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, status, prefecture, address, layout, remark, is_deleted, created_at FROM dormitories WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, name, type, status, prefecture, address, layout, remark, is_deleted, created_at FROM dormitories WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, name, type, status, prefecture, address, layout, remark, is_deleted, created_at FROM dormitories
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dormitories (name, type, prefecture, address, layout, remark, is_deleted, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{prefecture}, #{address}, #{layout}, #{remark}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE dormitories SET status = 'inactive' WHERE id = #{id}
